responsibilities: Build detailed financial models including DCF, LBO, and merger models to support client transaction recommendations
Prepare pitch books and client presentations summarizing valuation analysis, market positioning, and strategic alternatives
Conduct comparable company and precedent transaction analysis to benchmark valuation multiples across target industries
Coordinate due diligence processes with legal, accounting, and client teams during live M&A and capital raising transactions
Analyze financial statements and industry trends to identify potential acquisition targets and investment opportunities
Support senior bankers in structuring and negotiating deal terms for mergers, acquisitions, and capital markets transactions
Draft confidential information memoranda and management presentations for use in sell-side and buy-side engagements
Perform sensitivity and scenario analysis on financial models to stress-test transaction assumptions and outcomes
